statement.en: Quantitative phytochemical analysis of Achyranthes aspera, Tinospora cordifolia, Cisus quadrangularis and Mimosa pudica from the Ramgarh Block of Ramgarh District, Jharkhand

proposer: Tarun Kumar Munda, Ishwari Prasad Gupta

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future date suggests metadata anomaly or provisional status) reporting empirical phytochemical quantification. The work is contingent on peer review validation, lab reproducibility, and regional specificity. The truth-value of specific phytochemical measurements remains provisional pending publication and replication.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 4つの植物の内なる力が立方根で調和する不可思議な統一。

visualGlyph.interpretation: ラムガルの土から4つの星が中心の光へ向かう幾何学的共鳴。
